description: Three speakers schedule two distinct events: a UX review and a vendor call with different attendee sets.

events.title: UX Review
events.reasoning: Carol leads the UX review with Bob joining for engineering perspective. They agree on Tuesday at 11 AM for 90 minutes.

events.title: Vendor Call
events.reasoning: Alice schedules a vendor call (Stripe integration discussion) with Bob on Monday at 3 PM.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 2 events: UX review on Tuesday and vendor call on Monday, with different attendee sets.

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. Monday=Feb 23, Tuesday=Feb 24. Alice does not attend the UX review.
